summary: The diff addresses both REQ-1 and REQ-2 comprehensively. CSS custom properties are fixed in frontend/src/index.css with light ivory/gold values for --background and --foreground in :root, dark mode variables are isolated to the .dark class, and body/html receive explicit light backgrounds. All major pages (LandingPage, Dashboard, CreateInvitationWizard, InvitationEditor, GuestInvitation) use explicit light oklch background colors via inline styles. App.tsx forces light theme via ThemeProvider forcedTheme='light'. The design system color tokens (ivory, crimson, gold, rose, charcoal) are preserved in tailwind.config.js and index.css. The InvitationEditor retains a dark panel for the editor sidebar which is a deliberate dark editor UI. Overall the implementation appears solid for both requirements.
